_budgets_note: transition_budget and respawn_window_ms were struck from budgets below (Phase2a Task 4) — neither is read by the board or the plugin loop; the live transition-count backstop is decide()'s client-side DEFAULT_BUDGETS (orchestrator-core/src/config.ts), and the live CI-stall respawn window is that same DEFAULT_BUDGETS.respawn_window_ms, not this file. bounce_limit/per_edge_overrides below ARE live — they compile into the board's within_budget REJECT gate.
_epic_note: epic_analysis/epic_decompose/epic_integrating/epic_done (Phase 2b Task 8) are the v1-proven 4-stage epic tier (analyst brief -> decompose -> fan-in barrier -> done); the barrier's promoteAs:"analyst" posts the CLAIM-free promote MOVE under the analyst identity, enforced board-side by the epic_integrating->epic_done all_children_terminal gate (acme-main-v2.json). The 7-stage epic vision (Triage->Feasibility->...->Release, hub PO/PM/e2e roles) has zero evidence anywhere and is intentionally excluded — see the Phase 2b runbook's DEFERRED list.
